ddls:
CREATE TABLE "movies" (
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each movie */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the movie */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the movie was released */,
  "studio_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the studio that produced the movie */,
  "total_gross" REAL /* Total gross revenue from the movie */,
  "theaters" INTEGER /* Number of theaters the movie was released in */,
  "opening_gross" REAL /* Opening weekend gross revenue */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Release date of the movie */,
  "close_date" TEXT /* Date the movie left theaters */,
  "rating" TEXT /* MPAA rating of the movie */,
  "runtime_minutes" INTEGER /* Runtime of the movie in minutes */,
  "budget" REAL /* Budget allocated for the production of the movie */,
  "production_start_date" TEXT /* Date when production of the movie began */,
  "production_end_date" TEXT /* Date when production of the movie was completed */,
  "genre" TEXT /* Genre of the movie */,
  "country_of_origin" TEXT /* Country where the movie was produced */,
  "director_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the director of the movie */,
  "lead_actor_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the lead actor of the movie */,
  "trailer_views" INTEGER /* Number of views the movie's trailer has received */,
  "marketing_campaign_cost" REAL /* Cost of the marketing campaign for the movie */,
  "sequel" INTEGER /* Indicates if the movie is a sequel */,
  "sequel_of_movie_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the movie this one is a sequel of, if applicable */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("movie_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_movies_lead_actor_id FOREIGN KEY ("lead_actor_id") REFERENCES actors ("actor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_movies_sequel_of_movie_id FOREIGN KEY ("sequel_of_movie_id") REFERENCES movies ("movie_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_movies_director_id FOREIGN KEY ("director_id") REFERENCES directors ("director_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_movies_studio_id FOREIGN KEY ("studio_id") REFERENCES studios ("studio_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "studios" (
  "studio_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each studio */,
  "studio_name" TEXT /* Name of the studio */,
  "production_years" INTEGER /* Number of years the studio has been in production */,
  "headquarters" TEXT /* Location of the studio's headquarters */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the studio was founded */,
  "ceo" TEXT /* Name of the studio's CEO */,
  "website" TEXT /* URL of the studio's official website */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("studio_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "directors" (
  "director_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each director */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the director */,
  "award_wins" INTEGER /* Number of awards won by the director */,
  "dob" TEXT /* Date of birth of the director */,
  "country_of_birth" TEXT /* Country where the director was born */,
  "bio" TEXT /* A brief biography of the director */,
  "twitter_handle" TEXT /* The director's Twitter handle */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("director_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "actors" (
  "actor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each actor */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the actor */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the actor */,
  "awards" INTEGER /* Number of awards won by the actor */,
  "dob" TEXT /* Date of birth of the actor */,
  "country_of_birth" TEXT /* Country where the actor was born */,
  "bio" TEXT /* A brief biography of the actor */,
  "twitter_handle" TEXT /* The actor's Twitter handle */,
  "agent_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the actor's agent */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("actor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rating entry */,
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the movie being rated */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the rating (e.g., Rotten Tomatoes, Metacritic, IMDB) */,
  "score" REAL /* Score given to the movie by the source */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date when the rating was given */,
  "review_text" TEXT /* Text content of the review, if any */,
  "reviewer_name" TEXT /* Name of the reviewer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ratings_movie_id FOREIGN KEY ("movie_id") REFERENCES movies ("movie_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "box_office" (
  "box_office_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each box office entry */,
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the movie */,
  "week_number" INTEGER /* Week number of the box office report */,
  "gross_revenue" REAL /* Gross revenue for the week */,
  "domestic_gross" REAL /* Gross revenue from domestic theaters */,
  "international_gross" REAL /* Gross revenue from international theaters */,
  "screens" INTEGER /* Number of screens the movie was shown on during the week */,
  "average_ticket_price" REAL /* Average ticket price for the week */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("box_office_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_box_office_movie_id FOREIGN KEY ("movie_id") REFERENCES movies ("movie_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "awards" (
  "award_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each award entry */,
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the movie that won the award */,
  "award_type" TEXT /* Type of award won */,
  "year_won" INTEGER /* Year the award was won */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the award */,
  "award_description" TEXT /* A description of the award */,
  "award_ceremony" TEXT /* Name of the award ceremony */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("award_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_awards_movie_id FOREIGN KEY ("movie_id") REFERENCES movies ("movie_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the movie being reviewed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who submitted the review */,
  "review_text" TEXT /* Text content of the review */,
  "rating" REAL /* Rating given by the user */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date when the review was submitted */,
  "helpful_votes" INTEGER /* Number of helpful votes the review has received */,
  "not_helpful_votes" INTEGER /* Number of not helpful votes the review has received */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_reviews_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_reviews_movie_id FOREIGN KEY ("movie_id") REFERENCES movies ("movie_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "join_date" TEXT /* Date the user joined the platform */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "profile_picture_url" TEXT /* URL of the user's profile picture */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., Admin, User, Moderator) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., Active, Inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
